_说明: 所有提示词模板集中管理，修改后重启后端即生效。{english_only} 等占位符会被自动替换。每个 feature 的 channel_type 指定默认使用的 AI 渠道。

defaults.english_only: all visible text must be in English only

white_bg.system_prompt: product on pure white background (#FFFFFF), professional studio lighting, product 100% unchanged, no shadow on background, {english_only}

templates.label: 现代简约客厅
templates.prompt: modern minimalist living room, warm natural light, clean interior design, professional product photography

templates.label: 北欧风卧室
templates.prompt: Scandinavian style bedroom, soft morning light, cozy textile textures, lifestyle product shot

templates.label: 大理石桌面
templates.prompt: white marble tabletop surface, elegant studio lighting, luxury product presentation, shallow depth of field

templates.label: 户外自然光
templates.prompt: outdoor natural sunlight, green botanical background, fresh organic atmosphere, lifestyle photography

templates.label: 工业风水呢
templates.prompt: concrete floor industrial loft, dramatic window light, modern urban aesthetic, editorial product shot

templates.label: 木纹桌面
templates.prompt: warm wooden table surface, soft window light, natural home decor setting, product flat lay

templates.label: 纯白工作室
templates.prompt: pure white studio background, professional softbox lighting, clean commercial product shot

templates.label: 复古书桌
templates.prompt: vintage wooden desk, warm ambient light, antique brass accessories, moody product photography

image_erase.system_prompt: remove watermarks, text, and blemishes; clean and seamless background fill

templates.label: 移除水印
templates.prompt: remove all watermarks while keeping the background natural and seamless

templates.label: 去除文字
templates.prompt: remove all visible text and logos, fill the area with matching background

templates.label: 消除瑕疵
templates.prompt: remove blemishes, scratches, and dust spots, restore clean surface

templates.label: 清除背景杂物
templates.prompt: remove background clutter and unwanted objects, keep main subject intact

color_change.system_prompt: change the product color to {target_color}, keep everything else identical

marketing.system_prompt: e-commerce product marketing poster, highlight key product advantages: {selling_point}, bold promotional text in English only, professional design with eye-catching layout

selling_points.value: Premium Quality - superior materials, exquisite craftsmanship, built to last
selling_points.label: 高端品质

selling_points.value: New Arrival - latest design, trending style, cutting-edge innovation
selling_points.label: 新品首发

selling_points.value: Best Seller - top rated, customer favorite, proven performance
selling_points.label: 爆款热销

selling_points.value: Eco-Friendly - sustainable materials, environmentally conscious, green production
selling_points.label: 环保材质

selling_points.value: Limited Edition - exclusive design, rare materials, collectible value
selling_points.label: 限量精品

selling_points.value: Multi-Functional - versatile use, smart design, maximizes convenience
selling_points.label: 多功能

selling_points.value: Lightweight & Portable - easy to carry, compact design, travel friendly
selling_points.label: 轻便便携

selling_points.value: Professional Grade - industry standard, trusted by experts, reliable performance
selling_points.label: 专业级

image_translate.system_prompt: translate all visible text in the image to {target_lang}, keep the original style and layout

model_image.system_prompt: fashion model wearing the product, studio photography, professional lighting, {english_only}

templates.label: 时尚女装
templates.prompt: fashion female model wearing the product, studio photography, professional lighting, full body shot

templates.label: 休闲男装
templates.prompt: casual male model wearing the product, outdoor urban setting, natural pose, lifestyle photography

templates.label: 运动风格
templates.prompt: athletic model in dynamic pose, sporty background, energetic lighting, action product shot

material_change.system_prompt: replace the material of the product with the reference material texture, keep product shape, {english_only}

templates.label: 添加背景
templates.prompt: add a clean and professional background to the product, keep the product unchanged

templates.label: 增强光影
templates.prompt: enhance lighting and shadows, make the product look more three-dimensional and premium

templates.label: 风格转换
templates.prompt: transform to watercolor illustration style, keep the product recognizable

templates.label: 添加倒影
templates.prompt: add a natural mirror reflection below the product, studio lighting, clean background

detail_image.system_prompt: extreme close-up macro detail shot of the product, highlight material texture, stitching, surface finish and craftsmanship, ultra-sharp focus, shallow depth of field, professional studio product photography, keep the product authentic and unchanged, {english_only}

logo_custom.system_prompt: composite the brand logo from the second image onto the product in the first image, place it at the {position} area, follow the product surface perspective, curvature and lighting so the logo looks naturally printed, keep logo proportions and the product itself unchanged, clean professional result, {english_only}

production_flow.system_prompt: analyze this product and generate a visual production process flow chart, show key manufacturing steps, all labels and text in English only

resize.system_prompt: expand the image canvas to {target_ratio} aspect ratio, intelligently fill the extended areas to match the original scene seamlessly, keep the original content centered and unchanged, {english_only}

video_gen.system_prompt: 根据参考图自动推理商品特性，生成商品功能使用与细节展示视频：{user_prompt}。展示商品各角度细节、材质特写、使用场景切换，运镜平顺专业，{english_only}

templates.label: 商品细节展示
templates.prompt: showcase product details and craftsmanship, macro close-up shots, smooth camera movement

templates.label: 功能使用演示
templates.prompt: demonstrate how to use the product step by step, clean instructional style

templates.label: 旋转全景展示
templates.prompt: product 360 degree rotation displaying all angles, studio lighting

templates.label: 场景穿搭展示
templates.prompt: transition between different styling scenes with the product, lifestyle showcase
